subject: feat(debug): add in-memory debug log system with floating pill
body:
Alpha-phase diagnostic tool following glow-props DEBUG_SYSTEM.md pattern.
Provides runtime error visibility without external dependencies.

- debugLog.ts: circular buffer (200 entries), typed sources/severities,
  pub/sub with immediate delivery, console.error/warn interception,
  global error/unhandledrejection capture, report generation with
  URL redaction
- clipboardUtils.ts: three-tier clipboard fallback (ClipboardItem Blob,
  writeText, textarea execCommand) for all browser contexts
- DebugPill.svelte: floating pill with inline styles (not Tailwind),
  3 tabs (Log, Environment, PWA Diagnostics), mounted in separate
  #debug-root outside SvelteKit tree for crash isolation
- app.html: #debug-root div, pre-framework inline script with
  window.__debugPushError() bridge and 20-second loading timeout
- +layout.svelte: mounts DebugPill into #debug-root via new DebugPill()

Tags: debug, diagnostics, alpha, infrastructure
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: debug-system
Semver: minor
